calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar May-03-2010 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2010 Continued To May-03-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet Mangini for Sanford Bucklan and Mona O'Grady.

Ms. Mangini stated that the both Parties would state that they obtained a marriage license within days of the marriage ceremony and that she could provide a supplemental declaration. The Court will accept a supplemental declaration from each Party with regard to what was stated by Counsel. The matter was continued to May 3, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. The supplemental declarations are due by April 28, 2010.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Rhonda Aguilar, CSR 956. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
